text:
There lived an elephant who loved crossword puzzles. Every Sunday afternoon she’d visit a nearby park. There sat an elderly owl who couldn’t believe his eyes. Every week she solved a harder puzzle. That last Sunday…the owl flew closer...I think I saw him wink?

The owl cracked wise.

She just smiled.

So he tried harder.

Finally finished. There it was—I think—I.

She glanced. Just numbers.

"Aha!"

They flew circles. She laughed.

"How about this?"

"Oh."

He scribbled.

She loved it. Then she guessed.

"And..."

She read.

"That."

He winked.

That’s my girl.”


Just yesterday.

My aunt?

They found it.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
